key.name: instance-id
key.description: UUID v4 generated on first enable and persisted forever. Used as the per-display settings key on the daemon side; survives renames, GPU swaps, and DE restarts.

key.name: display-name
key.summary: Human-readable display name reported to the daemon

key.name: clear-color
key.summary: Fallback solid color shown when no frame has arrived

key.name: show-diagnostics
key.summary: Overlay connection state on top of the wallpaper

key.name: renderer-binary
key.summary: Override path to the renderer entry point
key.description: Empty string means use the renderer.js bundled with the extension. Absolute path points at an alternate executable for development.
